### Issue URL (Ads) [https://www.facebook.com/marketplace/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.facebook.com%2Fmarketplace%2F) ### Comment > Annoying dynamic ads are appearing on Facebook marketplace. They used to be blocked, but after updating Safari, they're back. I can block each individual element, but there are a lot of them. ### Screenshots
